bug.description: type confusion where a pointer is cast to an incompatible struct type

prompt:
There is a type confusion where a pointer is cast to an incompatible struct type downstream of function encode_tmgi_mobile_identity in the openair3/NAS/COMMON subsystem.
The function is located at openair3/NAS/COMMON/IES/MobileIdentity.c:631.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
